title: sorbus aria var. danubialis
intro: Sorbus aria var. danubialis, also known as the Hungarian whitebeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to Central and Eastern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sorbus aria var. danubialis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
